title: Economist Tyler Cowen on How ChatGPT Is Changing Your Job - Ep. 7 with Tyler Cowen
title_zh: 经济学家Tyler Cowen谈ChatGPT如何改变你的工作-与Tyler Cowen的第7集
full_text: Tyler Cowen is an economist who has been thinking about the impact of technology on life, work, and the economy for the past decade. He is a prolific writer behind the leading economic blog Marginal Revolution, a professor of economics at George Mason University, and the author of 17 books. In this episode, I dive deep with him on how ChatGPT will change the economy, and how he uses it in his own life. We get into: How ChatGPT makes him smarter How he uses it for deep reading and research

## clean_text

Tyler Cowen is an economist who has been thinking about the impact of technology on life, work, and the economy for the past decade. He is a prolific writer behind the leading economic blog Marginal Revolution, a professor of economics at George Mason University, and the author of 17 books. In this episode, I dive deep with him on how ChatGPT will change the economy, and how he uses it in his own life. We get into: How ChatGPT makes him smarter How he uses it for deep reading and research
